name: Banana Pineapple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients: salt, all-purpose flour, baking soda, and cinnamon.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (eggs, oil, crushed pineapple, mashed bananas, and vanilla extract) to the dry mixture.
3. Blend the ingredients together on low speed until combined; do not overmix.
4. Pour the batter into a greased tube pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for approximately 1 hour and 20 minutes, checking at the one-hour mark.
6. Remove from the oven and set aside to cool without removing it from the pan.
